name: Mhast (onshore)
scope: Oil and gas exploration and production.
area: Angola (Cabinda) - onshore and offshore; The Democratic Republic of the Congo (Zaire) - onshore coastal area and offshore.
remarks: Adopted by CABGOC with intention of being Mhast 1951 (CRS code 4703) but because it uses a different ellipsoid it is a different system. From 1979, for offshore use replaced by Mhast (offshore) (CRS code 4705) from which this CRS differs by approximately 10m.
